title: Sharper AI | AI Office Assistant Built on Your Knowledge
excerpt: Your intelligent office assistant for specialized task automation. Upload documents, give instructions, and receive complete, context-aware deliverables instantly.
content_text: Sharper AIThe AI officeassistant builton your knowledgeSharper AI is an AI office assistant that works from your documents and connected apps to answer questions, summarize, research, draft emails, and manage your schedule.Start workingCapabilitiesWhat do you need done?Four modes of work. One office assistant that turns your context into finished outcomes.Sharper reads across sources, resolves the signal, and returns a cited brief.EvidenceMarket report01Meeting notes02Verified web03Are enterprise buyers consolidating their AI tools?SharperYes. Buyers are standardizing on fewer approved platforms. Market reportYour meeting notes and recent coverage point to the same shift. sentences.en: The AI officeassistant builton your knowledge
sentences.zh: 基于您的知识的人工智能办公助手

blocks.html_en: Sharper AI is an AI office assistant that works from your documents and connected apps to answer questions, summarize, research, draft emails, and manage your schedule.

sentences.en: Sharper AI is an AI office assistant that works from your documents and connected apps to answer questions, summarize, research, draft emails, and manage your schedule.
sentences.zh: Sharper AI 是一款人工智能办公助手，可根据您的文档和连接的应用程序来回答问题、总结、研究、起草电子邮件和管理您的日程安排。

blocks.html_en: Four modes of work. One office assistant that turns your context into finished outcomes.

sentences.en: One office assistant that turns your context into finished outcomes.
sentences.zh: 一位办公室助理可以将您的背景转化为最终结果。

blocks.html_en: Sharper reads across sources, resolves the signal, and returns a cited brief.

sentences.en: Sharper reads across sources, resolves the signal, and returns a cited brief.
sentences.zh: 夏普阅读各种来源，解析信号，并返回引用的摘要。

blocks.html_en: Are enterprise buyers consolidating their AI tools?

sentences.en: Are enterprise buyers consolidating their AI tools?
sentences.zh: 企业买家是否正在整合他们的人工智能工具？

blocks.html_en: Yes. Buyers are standardizing on fewer approved platforms. Market report

sentences.en: Buyers are standardizing on fewer approved platforms.
sentences.zh: 买家正在越来越少的经过批准的平台上进行标准化。

blocks.html_en: Your meeting notes and recent coverage point to the same shift. Meeting notes Verified web

sentences.en: Your meeting notes and recent coverage point to the same shift.
sentences.zh: 您的会议记录和最近的报道都表明了同样的转变。

blocks.html_en: Your files. Your knowledge. Ready to work.
Drop in the material your team already trusts. Sharper turns it into a reusable knowledge base, then takes you straight to the workspace.
